backend: helm: Mark failed install verification
backend: Reject unsupported Jaeger tracing endpoint

skipped.reason: 38 PRs: SHA unchanged since last review
174 new open PRs: all had human review activity (reviews or comments > 0)

style_guide: Commit subject format: `area: SubArea: Description` — description starts with capital letter.
Keep commit subject under 72 characters (soft limit).
Do NOT include auto-close keywords (Fixes, closes) in commit messages — PR body is acceptable.
Approval style is warm and brief: maintainers merge with minimal ceremony.
copilot-pull-request-reviewer[bot] reviews do NOT count as human review.
PRs must fix a real bug, add a feature, or address a clear maintenance need.
Frontend: fix exhaustive-deps lint violations rather than suppressing with eslint-disable.
Backend: use comma-ok type assertions; structured logging via slog; test-first style.
Tests required for both frontend (Vitest) and backend (Go test) when changing logic.
CNCF CLA is a hard merge blocker.
